title: Rookie Year by Halos1
lyrics: 808 caught the sound, ain't those ones up, rookie year DJ Flare, make the money flare You need to get the fuck from behind me I can feel your knife tryna penetrate my spongy Complex rhyme schemes, spit the hex Rap rookie year, they still thinkin' I'm a vet Make a mess of a tiny rapper till they mind bleed You're finite and fickle while I deploy missiles Riddle the riddler, rattle a ritual ridicule Simply obtuse to keep it simple to you and her goose So rude and so pensive, bitch, stop getting so defensive I'm stating the truth, what is your Satan to you? A liquid and spoon, pill on the foil I'm sitting here rotting but still never spoil You are to me just like water to oil, why so disloyal? Takin' it up a notch, breakin' it back when breakin' her off Takin' no breaks when I'm takin' her off Kept it in her mouth till I fuckin' passed out Now I bet you that bitch won't forget what I'm about Mr. Long and Stout, damn her thoughts deep I'm like, ooh-wee, bitch, comin' home with me Flow OD when the flow on me Listen, homie, I'm just so OP, I'm just so elite I'm making y'all sound like you got broken speech Still on the blues, still rob you fools Still take the blame when the blame is on you Main dope, Skanko, this is what I do So don't you worry bout a thing Unless that thing is some green guts Want all you want, you can't be Puss won't ever be defeated Even if I had no feet, bruh Big ol' sticks stickin' out my pocket Clippers and extenders so it flashes as I'm walkin' Bumpin' old tapes in my Walkman Say, big ol' Glocks hangin' out my waistband Big ol' rocks in my socks, put them in your dang hand Bitch, you so fake, you a spray tan I'm hittin' these walls with my spray cans Our friends on bitches, out here in the end zone with it Boujee by the kittens that I stick my dick in So if we ever fuck, girl, you should feel privileged Our friends on bitches, out here in the end zone with it Boujee by the kittens that I stick my dick in So if we ever fuck, girl, you should feel privileged To even talk to me, bitch
